settings.text: Our in-house PBfulfill inspection team checks each order before shipping. This helps you avoid refunds, disputes, and customer complaints.

settings.description: 30% of returns in dropshipping are caused by poor product quality.
One inspection can reduce refund rates by up to 70%.

settings.section_heading: Why Product Quality Inspection Matters in Dropshipping

settings.label: Appearance and Material Check
settings.desc: We examine every unit for surface defects, colour deviation from the approved sample, stitching and seam quality, scratches, and material consistency. Defects are classified as critical, major, or minor, so you know whether a batch has a cosmetic issue or a problem that will generate refund requests.

settings.label: Functionality Testing
settings.desc: Electronics are powered on. Moving parts are cycled. Zips, clasps, switches, and hinges are operated. Battery items are charge-tested. We test against the standard you approve at the sample stage, across an agreed sample size rather than a spot check, and we record the pass rate for each batch.

settings.label: Packaging and Label Verification
settings.desc: We confirm packaging matches the approved design, labels are correctly placed and legible, barcodes scan on the first pass, and any country-specific compliance marking - CE, FCC, RoHS, or CPSIA- is present and accurate. Wrong-market labelling is the most expensive error to catch late.

settings.label: Quantity and Weight Verification
settings.desc: Every batch is counted against the purchase order and weighed against expected unit weight. A discrepancy in either usually indicates a substitution or a short-ship from the factory, and we resolve it with the supplier before the goods move into fulfillment.

settings.label: Brand Consistency and Logo Check
settings.desc: Logo placement, print colour, size, and orientation are checked against your brand guidelines on every unit and every piece of packaging. We caught a fully mis-printed logo run for a European client at this stage, the rework was paid by the factory, and the launch date was held.

settings.heading: What We Check in Every Pre-Shipment Inspection

settings.step_description: Once goods arrive at our facility, we log quantities, inspect packaging condition, and register each batch to ensure it matches the confirmed order details.
We check product appearance, materials, and core functions based on agreed standards, identifying visible defects or performance issues before fulfillment begins.
Our team verifies packaging accuracy, label placement, barcodes, and branding details to ensure consistency with approved samples and compliance requirements.

settings.step_title: Issue Report with Photo and Video Proof
settings.step_description: Any issues found are documented with photos or videos and compiled into a clear inspection report, allowing fast decisions before orders move forward.
Based on your confirmation, approved goods are stored for fulfillment, while non-compliant items are returned, replaced, or reworked per agreed instructions.

settings.main_heading: How Our Quality Inspection Process Works
settings.bottom_text: Inspect your next order before it ships.

settings.bold: What You Receive in Every Inspection Report

settings.content: Every inspected batch produces a written report delivered within 24 hours of inspection, covering the checkpoints tested, the sample size used, the pass and fail count, and any defects found with their classification.

settings.heading: Our Quality Inspection Facility and Equipment
settings.subtext: Our warehouse is equipped with professional tools, weight scales, inspection lamps, measuring instruments, and humidity protection systems, ensuring accuracy in every test.

settings.heading: PB Fulfill Compared with Third-Party Inspection Companies

settings.title: Missing Component Detected Before Shipping
settings.description: During functional testing, we discovered missing components in a factory batch and halted fulfillment immediately. The issue was corrected before shipping, helping a US seller avoid large-scale returns and customer disputes.

settings.title: Logo Error Caught in Packaging Check
settings.description: Our packaging inspection revealed an incorrect logo printed on the boxes. We coordinated a fast rework with the factory, ensuring the European brand’s packaging stayed consistent before products reached customers.

settings.title: Higher Store Ratings Through Inspection Reporting
settings.description: By providing detailed inspection reports with photos and videos, we helped an Australian seller proactively resolve quality concerns, reduce complaints, and improve overall customer ratings across multiple orders.

settings.question: Do you inspect products before shipping?
settings.answer: Yes. All products undergo basic quality inspection after arriving from the factory. If needed, we can also provide product photos for additional reassurance.

settings.heading: Inspect Your Next Order Before It Ships
